subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! I bear witness that Thou hast created all created things as a manifestation of Thy grace and bounty, and as an expression of Thy generosity and mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی اشهد انک خلقت الخلق اظهارا لفضلک و عطائک و ابرازا لجودک و رحمتک
subcodes.subjects: @creation of the world, @Word of God the cause of creation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
